sale_low_stock_warning: Imeandikwa. Lakini {item} inakaribia kuisha — imebaki {remaining_stock} {unit} tu!

weekly_report: Wiki hii: Faida jumla {currency} {total_profit}. Kila siku {currency} {avg_daily_profit}. Siku bora: {best_day}. Miamala {total_transactions}.
credit_profile: Kwa siku {period_days} zilizopita: average daily revenue {currency} {avg_daily_revenue}, average daily profit {currency} {avg_daily_profit}, active days {active_days}, consistency score {consistency_score}. Risk level: {risk_level}.
photo_unclear: Sikuweza kusoma transaction vizuri kutoka kwenye picha hiyo. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
welcome: Karibu Susu Books! Bonyeza kitufe kijani na uniambie kuhusu biashara yako.
